versions.version_description: Capo on first fret with simplified, open chords.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Play with capo on 1st fret to make your life easier.

Chords:
-------
[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]       x13231
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       xx1333
Ebmaj7 (2)   c68786[/tab]
[ch]Cm7[/ch]          x35343
[ch]F7[/ch]           131211
[ch]Dm7[/ch]          x57561
[ch]Gm7[/ch]          353333

Intro:
[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  
[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]F7[/ch] (2 times)

Verse:

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
(Sunrise) There's a new sun arisin'.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
(In your eyes) I can see a new horizon[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
(Realize) That will keep me realizin'[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]F7[/ch]
You're the biggest part of me.[/tab]

(Stay the night) Need your lovin' here beside me.
(Shine the light) Need you close enough to guide me.
(All my life) I've been hopin' you would find me.
You're the biggest part of me.

[tab][ch]F[/ch] - [ch]F7[/ch] 
      Well . . .[/tab]

Chorus:

[tab]       [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Make a wish baby[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch] 
Well and love will make it come true.[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Make a list, baby[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch] 
Of the things I'll do for you.[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Ain't no risk, now,[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
In lettin' my love rain down on you,[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Cm7[/ch] 
So we could wash away the past,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F7[/ch]
So that we may start anew.[/tab]

Verse:
(Rainbow) Risin' up on my shoulder.
(Love flows) Gettin' better as we're older.
(All I know) All I want to do is hold her,
She's the life that breathes in me.
(Forever) Got a feelin' that forever
(Together) We are gonna stay together.
(For better) For me, there's nothin' better.
You're biggest part of me.

Chorus:
Make a wish, baby
(Wish and it will come true.)
Well, and love will make it come true.
Make a list, baby
(Make a list of things for you.)
Of the things I'll do for you.
Ain't no risk, now,
(Let it rain on you.)
In lettin' my love rain down on you,
So we could wash away the past,
So that we may start anew.

Bridge:
[ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2)
[ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2) - [ch]Dm7[/ch] - [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2) - [ch]Dm7[/ch] - [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]
More than an easy feelin',[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2)   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
She brings joy to me.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
How can I tell you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch] - [ch]Dm7[/ch] - [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2) - [ch]Dm7[/ch] - [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2)
What it means to me?[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Flow like a lazy river[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch](2)  [ch]Dm7[/ch] 
For an e - ternity.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I've finally found someone[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
(Who believes. Who believes in me.)[/tab]
Who believes in me,

[tab]         [ch]F7[/ch] 
And I'll never leave.[/tab]
(Now I've found what I need.)

Oh, not to doubt now.
Mmmm, ain't life grand.
(guitar/sax solo)

[Chorus]

(Beside me) Need your lovin' here beside me
(To guide me) Keep it close enough to guide me
(Inside of me) From the fears that are inside of me.
You're the biggest part of me
(Forever) Got a feelin' that forever
(Together) We are gonna stay together
(Forever) From now until forever.
You're the biggest part of me.
You're the life that breathes in me.
You're the biggest part of me.

You changed my life.
You made it right.
I'll be a servant to you for the rest of my life.
